heroText: Ingabe isayithi likusize ukuthola isiteshi noma ukubuyela emgwaqweni? Ufuna ukusiza ukugcina limahhala kwabanye abagibeli bamabhayisikili? Noma iyiphi inani lisiza ukukhokhela izindleko zokuphatha nokuthuthukisa.
stripeNotice: Ukukhokha okuphephile nge-Stripe (USD). Awekho amininingwane ekhadi agcinwa yilolu hlelo lokusebenza.
keepingFree: Ukugcina uhlelo lokusebenza lumahhala futhi lunakekelwa
successMessage: Isipho sakho sisiza ukugcina BicycleRepairStations limahhala futhi linakekelwa kubagibeli bamabhayisikili yonke indawo.
